title: Calculation Date function using interval and year
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_1 ( id_tempo serial PRIMARY KEY, data timestamp NOT NULL );
SELECT data FROM dim_tempo_1 WHERE data BETWEEN '2013-01-01'::timestamp - INTERVAL '1 year' AND '2013-01-02'::timestamp - INTERVAL '1 year';
CREATE TABLE dim_tempo_2 ( id_tempo serial PRIMARY KEY, data date NOT NULL CHECK (data >= '2000-01-01') );
key_bug_features: Calculation Date function using interval with year
